# Compass

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Compass icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Compass;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Compass { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
direction, north, east, south, west, safari, browser

## Categories
navigation, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/compass)
